title: New Heights
description: A no-nonsense modpack focused on pure, raw, performance!
body:
# New Heights
### Boost your FPS to new heights with this performance-first modpack!
This modpack strives to fix Minecraft's performace issues, with only a few mods!
FPS is commonly tripled, in some cases quadrupled with these mods installed!

**Benchmark:**
Max: 1500
Avg: 900
Min: 400

Specs:

```
CPU: Ryzen  5600G
GPU: Radeon 6650XT
RAM: 16GB DDR4
```
